title: Verify analytics events are triggered for key actions in the Trial Corner
description: Test that viewing the widget, clicking it, viewing the corner, and clicking cancel/pause/remind buttons trigger the specified analytics events with correct attributes.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is eligible for the Trial Corner.

steps.description: 1. Load the homepage and verify 'trial-corner-widget-viewed' event is fired.
2. Click the widget and verify 'trial-corner-widget-clicked' and 'trial-corner-viewed' events are fired.
3. In the Trial Corner, click 'Pause Trial'. Verify 'pause-clicked' event is fired with 'trial corner' as page_source.
4. On the pop-up, click 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'. Verify 'cancel-clicked' event is fired with 'cancel pop-up' as page_source.

expected_result: All specified events are logged correctly in the analytics system with the right attributes (variant, page source, etc.) corresponding to each user action.
